# Claude Design System

> A React + CSS design system and docs site, mirroring the Claude Design System Figma library
> (file key njWLlZEF7ekubL8zrsegQ3). Covers design tokens, 16 text styles, 88 icons, and 19
> components. Each component has a live demo and a props table.

Machine-readable references (in the repo, https://github.com/JonnySLT/design-system-demo):
- AGENTS.md — repo orientation: structure, token rules, component → Figma node-id map.
- components.json — manifest of every component: import path, props (name/type/default), Figma node id, doc URL.
- tokens.json — design tokens in W3C DTCG format (light values; dark in tokens.css).
- TOKENS.md — Figma-variable ↔ CSS-variable mapping (prose).

## Foundations
- [Design Tokens](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/foundations/tokens): token system overview
- [Colors](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/foundations/colors): primitive + semantic color tokens
- [Typography](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/foundations/typography): 16 text styles
- [Spacing](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/foundations/spacing): spacing, radius, elevation

## Components
- [Button](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/components/button)
- [Icons](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/components/icons): all 88 icons, searchable
- [Checkbox](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/components/checkbox)
- [Input](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/components/input)
- [Radio](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/components/radio)
- [Select](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/components/select)
- [Toggle](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/components/toggle)
- [Avatar](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/components/avatar)
- [Badge](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/components/badge)
- [Card](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/components/card)
- [Tabs](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/components/tabs)
- [Tooltip](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/components/tooltip)
- [Alert](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/components/alert)
- [Modal](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/components/modal)
- [Spinner](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/components/spinner)
- [Toast](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/components/toast)
- [Navbar](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/components/navbar)
- [Nav Item](https://jonnyslt.github.io/design-system-demo/#/components/nav-item)
